sourceMovie.title: Pandora
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Pandora for the same reason it broke through in 2016: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a drama rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Chanion Kim keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Home
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Pandora clicked for you, Home (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in fantasy and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Pandora?
faq.answer: Try Home, The First Time, Paperman—each shares DNA with Pandora while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Pandora?
faq.answer: Pandora (2016) is best described as drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Pandora worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this film lane.
